description: Structured feedback schema for the self-improving agent loop. Single source of truth — referenced by generators and the Improver agent.

agent.description: Agent ID that performed the task

task.description: Brief description of what was asked

duration_s.description: Time spent on task in seconds

user_edits.description: What the user changed after the agent finished (Phase 2)

improver_rejection.description: Why a prior improvement proposal was rejected

special_task_values.improver-approved: Logged when an Improver proposal is approved and applied
special_task_values.improver-rejected: Logged when an Improver proposal is rejected by the user
